mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, username, display_name, password_hash, authorities_csv, enabled, must_change_password from batch.console_user_account where lower(username) = lower(#{username}) limit 1

select id, tenant_id, username, display_name, password_hash, authorities_csv, enabled, must_change_password from batch.console_user_account where tenant_id = 'system' and username in
#{u}

select id, tenant_id, username, display_name, authorities_csv, enabled, must_change_password, created_at, updated_at from batch.console_user_account
and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
and (username ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or display_name ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc
select id, tenant_id, username, display_name, authorities_csv, enabled, must_change_password, created_at, updated_at from batch.console_user_account where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, tenant_id, username, display_name, authorities_csv, enabled, must_change_password, created_at, updated_at from batch.console_user_account where lower(username) = lower(#{username}) limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into batch.console_user_account (tenant_id, username, display_name, password_hash, authorities_csv, enabled) values (#{tenantId}, #{username}, #{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{authoritiesCsv}, true)
mapper.update: update batch.console_user_account set display_name = #{displayName}, authorities_csv = #{authoritiesCsv}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update batch.console_user_account set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update batch.console_user_account set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, must_change_password = #{mustChangePassword}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update batch.console_user_account set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
